title: GridStatus NYISO 5 minute standardized data
description:
This table is a curated set of five-minute data for NYISO. All standardized datasets are intended to speed up analysis and feature engineering work by providing commonly used data series in one denormalized table. 

The standardized datasets are a conveience for API users who only want to query one dataset for each ISO. If you plan on loading in every dataset or want to work with more multiple series alone and together it is recommended to pull the individual datasets to have full visibility into each one.

⚠️ Not all data series are present for the entire length of the dataset. This can occur due to a lack of historical data or the publication of new core datasets by an ISO.
